<!-- markdownlint-disable MD041 -->
<!--
  Thanks for creating a pull request to request a new sub-domain from mmdevs.org

  GUIDE:

  No other additional actions are required , just need the the following:

  1.check "[x]"
    example : "- [x] I have read and accepted the [Terms and Conditions](https://github.com/phothinmg/mmdevs.org/wiki/Terms-and-Conditions)"

  2.check "[x]"
    example : "- [x] There is reasonable content on the page"

  3.replace "repo_url" inside <> with your host repo url.
    example: "Host repo of my page is <https://github.com/owner/repo>"

  4.replace "site_url" inside <> with your page url.
    example: "The site content can be seen at <https://example.com>"
-->

- [] I have read and accepted the [Terms and Conditions](https://github.com/phothinmg/mmdevs.org/wiki/Terms-and-Conditions)

- [] There is reasonable content on the page

Host repo of my page is <repo_url>

The site content can be seen at <site_url>
